info.title: Crossmint API
info.description: Crossmint provides APIs for creating and managing wallets, minting NFTs and SFTs, managing collections, handling orders and payments, verifiable credentials, IP assets, and user management across multiple blockchain chains.

apiKey.description: Server-side API key from the Crossmint console
